content.query:
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD ='Osaka@cisco#123'
-----------------------------------
--- DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL ----
CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL danish_creds
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'
------------------------------------
-- External Data Source ------------

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_source
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://azuredwhlakedrasheed.dfs.core.windows.net/silver',
    CREDENTIAL = danish_creds
)
------------------------------------

--- External File Formats ----------

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_format
WITH
(
 FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT delta_format
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELTA
)

------------------------------------

---- Gold Source -------------------

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE gold_source
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://azuredwhlakedrasheed.dfs.core.windows.net/gold',
    CREDENTIAL = danish_creds
)
